home.caption: An object with structure and attitude.
home.copyright: © Andrea Dea Jones. All rights reserved.

objects.intro: Each object is developed independently, yet part of the same material and conceptual language where sustainability and elegance naturally coexist.

editions.title: Editions

objectEdition.title: Objects Edition
objectEdition.description: Our objects exist in different editions. Each edition defines how an object is produced, customized, and distributed, without ever compromising its conceptual integrity.

studio.title: Studio Edition
studio.description: The Studio Edition is produced to order. It allows for variations in materials and finishes, while respecting the object's original form and intent.

gallery.title: Gallery Edition
gallery.description: The Gallery Edition is produced in limited series. Each version is defined by a precise combination of materials and finishes, chosen as a specific interpretation of the object.

editions.note: Not all editions are available for every object. Some pieces exist only as Studio Editions, others only as Gallery Editions.

contact.title: GET IN TOUCH
contact.description: For inquiries, commissions or collaborations, please use the form below or contact directly. All messages are answered personally.
contact.name: Name

paragraphs.p1: Belgian-born, 37 years old, Andrea Dea Jones holds a Master's degree in Interior Architecture from the Academie des Beaux-Arts in Belgium.
paragraphs.p2: Her creative journey began early through internships at architectural studios across France, alongside freelance work on Paris fashion shows at the age of 25. These formative experiences led her to a role as an interior architect at the iconic Saint Laurent Paris. There, she took her first steps in object design.
paragraphs.p3: Five years ago, she relocated to Portugal, where she spent four years as a lead interior designer at a renowned office design company. There, she discovered a deep passion for creating bespoke, handcrafted furniture pieces that bring individuality and soul into every space.
paragraphs.p4: Andrea Dea Jones approaches design with a bold, playful sensibility, challenging convention by bringing approachability and a sense of fun into contemporary design. Influenced by street art as well as Virgil Abloh, minimalism, and Bauhaus principles, her work is both intentional and expressive.
paragraphs.p5: Grounded in human-centered thinking, each project translates lived experience into functional, emotionally resonant spaces. Her designs fuse aesthetic precision with feeling, creating interiors and objects that enrich daily life.
paragraphs.p6: She is also the co-founder of Jora Studio, an architecture and interior design office that combines creativity and functionality in every project, based in the Algarve.
